selections.name: Consulate
selections.reason: Excellent 2nd on debut on a slow track. Looks progressive and handles the wet conditions well.

selections.name: Woodenbridge
selections.reason: Solid 3rd behind Consulate on debut. Will be fitter for the run and has race experience.

selections.name: Castelbella
selections.reason: Finished 4th in the same debut race as the top two picks. Open to improvement.

selections.name: Adeleke
selections.reason: First starter from a top stable. Trials have been okay and gets the inside draw advantage.

danger_horse.name: Woodenbridge
danger_horse.reason: Finished right behind the top pick last start and has the tactical speed to challenge.

selections.name: Ready Forcocktails
selections.reason: Strong 2nd on a slow track last start. Top stable and jockey combination makes her the one to beat.

selections.name: Claudel
selections.reason: Consistent filly with two 2nd place finishes. Wide draw is a slight concern but has tactical speed.

selections.name: Pharland
selections.reason: Sat on the speed and boxed on well for 2nd on debut. Sure to play a major role.

selections.name: Creator Of World
selections.reason: Improved 2nd on a slow track last start. Gets a good draw and can feature in the finish.

danger_horse.name: Claudel
danger_horse.reason: Has shown excellent form in both starts and can overcome the wide barrier with early speed.

selections.name: Ballpark
selections.reason: Won well on a rain-affected track last start. Still on the upward spiral and drawn perfectly.

selections.name: My Shareena
selections.reason: Ran a strong 2nd on a slow track last start. Cherry ripe now and gets the inside run.

selections.name: Sister Daae
selections.reason: Solid 2nd on a slow track two starts back. Forgive last run, definitely worth including.

selections.name: Barbray
selections.reason: Finished 5th on a slow track last start. Finds a nice race and can improve without surprising.

danger_horse.name: My Shareena
danger_horse.reason: Peaking third-up and has an ideal inside draw to save ground on the wet track.

selections.name: John Dory
selections.reason: Ran a solid 3rd on a heavy track two starts back. Beautifully drawn and is a big chance to return to form.

selections.name: Hereward
selections.reason: Showed good form with a 3rd on a heavy track recently. Great chance to atone back in midweek company.

selections.name: Claim The Crown
selections.reason: Raced on the speed and boxed on steadily for 3rd on a slow track last start. Ready to peak.

selections.name: Kenmare Bay
selections.reason: Finished 3rd on a soft track before a break. Capable of running a bold race fresh.

danger_horse.name: Hereward
danger_horse.reason: Drops back to midweek company and has proven ability on heavy tracks.

selections.name: Conchiero
selections.reason: Solid 3rd on a slow track last start. Has won second-up in the past and is capable of building on that record.

selections.name: Iceman
selections.reason: Ran 4th on a heavy track two starts back. Hard to beat back in midweek company with a good draw.

selections.name: The Replicant
selections.reason: Consistent performer who was 5th on a slow track last start. Blinkers go back on which is a positive.

selections.name: Perfect Picture
selections.reason: Won well two starts back. Capable of attacking the line strongly if she handles the heavy conditions.

danger_horse.name: Iceman
danger_horse.reason: Drops in grade and has proven wet track form. Inside draw is a major advantage.

selections.name: Lull
selections.reason: Excellent 2nd on a slow track last start. Cherry ripe now and is right in contention.

selections.name: Sapling
selections.reason: Raced on the speed and boxed on steadily for 4th on a slow track last start. Blinkers applied for the first time.

selections.name: Piperita
selections.reason: Finished 4th on a slow track last start. Has ability and betting holds the key.

selections.name: Maz Kanata
selections.reason: Solid 4th on a slow track last start. Rock hard fit and capable of a top three finish from a good draw.

danger_horse.name: Sapling
danger_horse.reason: Blinkers go on and has the tactical speed to overcome the tricky conditions.
